name: Palmy
description: '''Eve Pancharoen''' ({{Langx|th|อีฟ ปานเจริญ}}; born August 7, 1981), known professionally as '''Palmy''' ({{Langx|th|ปาล์มมี่}}), is a Thai [[pop singer]]. Beginning with her self-titled solo debut, ''Palmy'', in 2001, she has recorded several albums, including concert [[DVD|DVDs]] on the [[GMM Grammy]] label. She has performed live with [[T-Bone (rapper)|T-Bone]] and appeared as a guest [[vocalist]] at other concerts and [[Music festival|music festivals]] in [[Japan]], [[South Korea]], [[Singapore]], [[Thailand]], and the [[United Kingdom]].
